references.raw: A randomized algorithm M is (0, δ) differentially private iff it is δ-TV-stable. Proof of Lemma A.5. Let P = Pr(M (x)) and Q = Pr(M (x′ )). For Part 1. For any measurable event E, if M is (ϵ, 0)-DP, then P (E) ≤ eϵ Q(E).
references.title: Proof of Lemma A.5
